rationale: The cited paper appears in grouped literature-review citations as an example of prior marketing M&A work on strategic-management topics such as product capital and long-term financial returns. In the citing paper, it is used to position a research gap (shift from macro firm-level outcomes to micro salesforce identification effects), not to supply a specific mechanism, measure, or empirical design that is then carried forward. Because the citation is not given a distinct functional role beyond background positioning, this is a passing/background use.
